mapper.select: SELECT COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN metric_code = 'mysql.delta.created_tmp_tables' THEN value ELSE 0 END), 0) AS tmp_tables_today, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN metric_code = 'mysql.delta.created_tmp_disk_tables' THEN value ELSE 0 END), 0) AS tmp_disk_tables_today, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN metric_code = 'mysql.delta.slow_queries' THEN value ELSE 0 END), 0) AS slow_queries_today FROM metric_data_1m WHERE instance_id = #{instanceId} AND metric_code IN ('mysql.delta.created_tmp_tables', 'mysql.delta.created_tmp_disk_tables', 'mysql.delta.slow_queries') AND collect_time >= date_trunc('day', NOW() AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Shanghai') AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Shanghai'
